cards.rules_text: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a land or Room card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

cards.rules_text:
Choose one —
• Lock or unlock a door of target room you control.
• Investigate twice. [i](To investigate, create a Clue token. It's an artifact with “{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.”)[/i]

Embed {G} [i](You may pay {G} to exile this card from your hand embedded in a nonland you control. Cast it for free when that permanent leaves. Embed only as a sorcery)[/i]
{G}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Activate only as a sorcery.

When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls.
When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, the owner of the exiled card creates a token that's a copy of it.
Create a token thats a copy of each of up to two target lands you control.
